forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,53 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: e480
+title: 'Commands: paste handler ŌĆö attachment onto task'
+---
+## What
+
+Implement `AttachmentOntoTaskHandler` ŌĆö attaches a file (by path from the clipboard) to a target task. Handler at `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/attachment_onto_task.rs`, matches `("attachment", "task")`.
+
+### Action
+
+1. Parse task id from target moniker; read attachment path from `clipboard.entity_id` (attachment monikers use the path as the id ŌĆö confirm via `attachment.yaml`).
+2. Invoke `AddAttachment` op (in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/attachment/`) with `(task_id, path, name, mime_type, size)`. Name/mime/size come from the clipboard `fields` payload populated during copy.
+3. Ignore `is_cut` ŌĆö attachments aren't "moved" by paste; cutting an attachment pastes a new association while the original stays in place on the source task. If the product requires "move" semantics later, extend then.
+4. Return the new attachment entity id.
+
+### Files
+
+- CREATE `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/attachment_onto_task.rs`.
+- MODIFY `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/mod.rs` ŌĆö register call.
+
+### Subtasks
+
+- [ ] Audit `AddAttachment` op signature; confirm what fields are needed.
+- [ ] Implement `AttachmentOntoTaskHandler`.
+- [ ] Register.
+- [ ] Colocate tests.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] Handler matches `("attachment", "task")`.
+- [ ] Pasting an attachment onto a task adds it to the task's attachments.
+- [ ] Source attachment remains on the original task regardless of `is_cut` (product decision; revisit if users ask for move semantics).
+- [ ] Duplicate attachments on the same task are allowed (the attachment entity id differs even if the path matches).
+
+## Tests
+
+- [ ] `paste_attachment_onto_task_adds_attachment` ŌĆö target task starts with zero attachments; after paste, has one with the expected path.
+- [ ] `paste_attachment_preserves_original` ŌĆö source task still has the attachment after paste.
+- [ ] `paste_attachment_ignores_cut_flag` ŌĆö cut attachment still exists on source.
+- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban paste_handlers::attachment_onto_task` ŌĆö all green.
+
+## Workflow
+
+- Use `/tdd`.
+
+#commands
+
+Depends on: 01KPG5YB7GTQ6Q3CEQAMXPJ58F (mechanism)
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value:
## What

Implement `AttachmentOntoTaskHandler` ŌĆö attaches a file (by path from the clipboard) to a target task. Handler at `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/attachment_onto_task.rs`, matches `("attachment", "task")`.

### Action

1. Parse task id from target moniker; read attachment path from `clipboard.entity_id` (attachment monikers use the path as the id ŌĆö confirm via `attachment.yaml`).
2. Invoke `AddAttachment` op (in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/attachment/`) with `(task_id, path, name, mime_type, size)`. Name/mime/size come from the clipboard `fields` payload populated during copy.
3. Ignore `is_cut` ŌĆö attachments aren't "moved" by paste; cutting an attachment pastes a new association while the original stays in place on the source task. If the product requires "move" semantics later, extend then.
4. Return the new attachment entity id.

### Files

- CREATE `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/attachment_onto_task.rs`.
- MODIFY `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/paste_handlers/mod.rs` ŌĆö register call.

### Subtasks

- [ ] Audit `AddAttachment` op signature; confirm what fields are needed.
- [ ] Implement `AttachmentOntoTaskHandler`.
- [ ] Register.
- [ ] Colocate tests.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Handler matches `("attachment", "task")`.
- [ ] Pasting an attachment onto a task adds it to the task's attachments.
- [ ] Source attachment remains on the original task regardless of `is_cut` (product decision; revisit if users ask for move semantics).
- [ ] Duplicate attachments on the same task are allowed (the attachment entity id differs even if the path matches).

## Tests

- [ ] `paste_attachment_onto_task_adds_attachment` ŌĆö target task starts with zero attachments; after paste, has one with the expected path.
- [ ] `paste_attachment_preserves_original` ŌĆö source task still has the attachment after paste.
- [ ] `paste_attachment_ignores_cut_flag` ŌĆö cut attachment still exists on source.
- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban paste_handlers::attachment_onto_task` ŌĆö all green.

## Workflow

- Use `/tdd`.
